result.stdout:
dotnet ildasm 0.12.2.0

Usage: dotnet ildasm [arguments] [options]

Arguments:
  assembly1  Assembly file path.

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information
  --version     Show version information
  -o|--output   Save output to file.
  -i|--item     Only disassembly a method or class. Usage: -i MyClass::Method
  -f|--force    Force output file to be overwritten.

Usage: dotnet ildasm [arguments] [options]
